name: agent-host-logs
tagline: Orients analysts to Agent Host debug log export bundles (events.jsonl, AHP logs, host/window logs) and how to correlate them.
verdict: Compact, well-organized log-triage guide with explicit, good sensitive-data handling advice (avoid quoting secrets/tokens found in logs). Weak spots: no defined output/report shape for findings (Q05 fail, mirrors the rubric's own fail example), the extractor script's python3 dependency isn't declared or checked (H07 warning), and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: "Use this skill to orient to bundles" / "How to Start" gives investigative steps but never defines a deliverable shape (report, format, or fields) for the analysis conclusions.
extract.py requires python3, invoked directly with no availability check or install guidance if missing.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
